mapper.select: SELECT st.id, st.expired_at, st.created_at, st.revoked, st.login_ip, u.username FROM sys_token st JOIN sys_user u ON st.user_id = u.id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_token ( id, user_id, access_token, refresh_token, expired_at, revoked, login_ip, device_fingerprint, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{expiredAt}, #{revoked}, #{loginIp}, #{deviceFingerprint}, #{createdAt} ) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET access_token = EXCLUDED.access_token, refresh_token = EXCLUDED.refresh_token, expired_at = EXCLUDED.expired_at, revoked = false, login_ip = EXCLUDED.login_ip, device_fingerprint = EXCLUDED.device_fingerprint, created_at = NOW()
